description:
GIVEN a user launches the app
AND the user is not logged in
AND the user has TTS enabled

steps.action: WHEN a user focuses on the "Login" button
steps.result:
THEN the app reader says “Log In, press select to Log In to your MLB.TV account, X of Y in the menu, press right or left for more items in the menu”

NOTE: X should be based on how many buttons are visible to the user in the menu and the place that Log In is in that order
